texts.label: text
texts.orig: Situated next to: Naivasha police station and along Mai Mahiu Road 1km from Naivasha town.
texts.text: Situated next to: Naivasha police station and along Mai Mahiu Road 1km from Naivasha town.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Panaroma Park Hotel Limited wishes to engage into a contract with you as the Tour agent/Travel consultant. The below rates are less 10% commission hence they are NET rates. The Hotel RACK rates have accompanied these net rates for your reference.
texts.text: Panaroma Park Hotel Limited wishes to engage into a contract with you as the Tour agent/Travel consultant. The below rates are less 10% commission hence they are NET rates. The Hotel RACK rates have accompanied these net rates for your reference.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NOTE: SINGLE(1PAX), DOUBLE/TWIN (2PAX), TRIPLE(one large bed+small bed for max 3pax), FAMILY SUITE (2rooms with a connecting door for 2adults+3kids below 12years)
texts.text: NOTE: SINGLE(1PAX), DOUBLE/TWIN (2PAX), TRIPLE(one large bed+small bed for max 3pax), FAMILY SUITE (2rooms with a connecting door for 2adults+3kids below 12years)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Panorama Park Hotel may at its discretion of not less than 1 months' notice in writing alter the specified rates.
texts.text:  Panorama Park Hotel may at its discretion of not less than 1 months' notice in writing alter the specified rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  In case of currency devaluation by more than 5%, we may at our own discretion increase the specified rates.
texts.text:  In case of currency devaluation by more than 5%, we may at our own discretion increase the specified rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of a booking and the balance paid on collection of accommodation vouchers 2 weeks before the arrival of the client at our establishment
texts.text:  A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of a booking and the balance paid on collection of accommodation vouchers 2 weeks before the arrival of the client at our establishment

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Festive seasons, Easter Holiday, Public holidays and Peak season, the supplement is Ksh.2,000 per room on the rack rates. The tour/travel agent does not get a commission on the supplement.
texts.text:  Festive seasons, Easter Holiday, Public holidays and Peak season, the supplement is Ksh.2,000 per room on the rack rates. The tour/travel agent does not get a commission on the supplement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  The Tour agent/Travel consultant shall always check availability in the hotel. Share a booking voucher then pay to confirm the booking. The hotel will not check in guests without that night's payment.
texts.text:  The Tour agent/Travel consultant shall always check availability in the hotel. Share a booking voucher then pay to confirm the booking. The hotel will not check in guests without that night's payment.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  The  Tour  agent/Travel  consultant  confirms  and  agrees  that  the  contents  of  this  agreement  are  strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text:  The  Tour  agent/Travel  consultant  confirms  and  agrees  that  the  contents  of  this  agreement  are  strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Situated next to: Naivasha police station and along Mai Mahiu Road 1km from Naivasha town.
texts.text: Situated next to: Naivasha police station and along Mai Mahiu Road 1km from Naivasha town.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  Confirmed Room Reservations not cancelled 72 hours before arrival will attract a retention charge equivalent to one night's room tariff. An entire booking will be charged for cancellations or postponement on the D-day.
texts.text:  Confirmed Room Reservations not cancelled 72 hours before arrival will attract a retention charge equivalent to one night's room tariff. An entire booking will be charged for cancellations or postponement on the D-day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 30 and 15 days from the date of arrival, 25% of the contract rate will be charged
texts.text:  For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 30 and 15 days from the date of arrival, 25% of the contract rate will be charged

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 14 and 3days from the date of arrival, 50% of the contract rate will be charged
texts.text:  For bookings cancelled or reduced in numbers between 14 and 3days from the date of arrival, 50% of the contract rate will be charged

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig:  In the case of cancellation within 3days of the date of arrival or incase of no show, 100% of the value of the booking will be charged
texts.text:  In the case of cancellation within 3days of the date of arrival or incase of no show, 100% of the value of the booking will be charged

texts.label: text
texts.orig: One  free  meal  will  be  offered  for  one  driver  guide  upon  bringing  guests  to  our  establishment.  We  also  offer  a discounted accommodation rate for drivers.
texts.text: One  free  meal  will  be  offered  for  one  driver  guide  upon  bringing  guests  to  our  establishment.  We  also  offer  a discounted accommodation rate for drivers.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: On behalf of the Tour/Travel Operator
texts.text: On behalf of the Tour/Travel Operator
